videos.title: Red Rock Canyon and L’Etape LAS VEGAS by Tour de France - Worst Retirement Ever
videos.description:
Hard to make a video and ride an event at the same time, thanks L'Etape for having me and running a great weekend, and all the fun folks I got to meet and ride with. 

Intro Music: Bad Religion
Outro Music: @brooklynduo

Want to support me and my show? Sponsors take care of that, so please consider a donation instead:
https://act.sierraclub.org/donate/rc_connect__campaign_designform?id=7013q000002NxclAAC
Contribute to my No Kid Hungry Campaign
https://p2p.onecause.com/chefscycle2023/phil-gaimon

My Recovery Product: https://www.icelegs.com
Order Cookie Merch and Phil's Books: https://www.philsfondo.com/shop

https://twitter.com/philgaimon
